title: Owen O'N�ill
content:
If poesy have truth at all,
            If some great lion of the Gael
        Shall rule the lovely land of F�l;
            O yellow mast and roaring sail!
        Carry the leadership for me,
        Writ in this letter, o'er the sea
            To great O'N�ill.
meaning:
James Stephens's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Owen O'N�ill"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
